description: Ensure state management for UI components follows URL-driven architectural guidelines.
Ensure custom hooks adhere to URL state and data isolation constraints.
Ensure data fetching adheres to API mocking and auth constraints.
Ensure Vite configuration maintains mock data isolation.
Ensure UI state is managed via URL queries without local component state
Ensure data filtering happens locally to prevent multiple API calls
Ensure new components follow the URL-Driven State Only architecture and do not use local state for filters or pagination.
Ensure custom hooks correctly parse URL parameters and isolate mock data, respecting the URL-driven state architecture.
Ensure UI components exclusively derive search state from URL query parameters
Ensure API requests include X-Trore-Auth header and interact with Vite middleware mock endpoints
Ensure state management follows URL-Driven state and avoids local state for filters.
Ensure state management hooks strictly enforce URL-driven state invariant.
